name: CrowdStrike OAuth API
description: This app integrates with CrowdStrike OAuth2 authentication standard to implement querying of endpoint security data

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Run a query against CrowdStrike API

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: API endpoint path in the format: /<service>/queries/<resource>/<version> (ex: /devices/queries/devices/v1)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression (FQL Syntax) (ex: last_seen: >'2020-01-01')

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index for results

actions.name: Query Device
actions.description: Fetch the device details based on the provided query

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum devices to be fetched

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids. (Defaults to 0)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression used to limit the fetched devices (FQL Syntax)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: A single, specific tenant id to search. By default, will search asset main tenant and all listed subtenants; to search only main tenant (even if you have subtenants) use 'main'

actions.name: List Groups
actions.description: Fetch the details of the host groups

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum host groups to be fetched

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression used to limit the fetched host groups (FQL Syntax)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

actions.name: Quarantine Device
actions.description: Block the device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of device IDs

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of hostnames

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: A single, specific tenant id to search. By default, will search asset main tenant and all listed subtenants; to search only main tenant (even if you have subtenants) use 'main'

actions.name: Unquarantine Device
actions.description: Unblock the device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of device IDs

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of hostnames

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: A single, specific tenant id to search. By default, will search asset main tenant and all listed subtenants; to search only main tenant (even if you have subtenants) use 'main'

actions.name: Assign Hosts
actions.description: Assign one or more hosts to the static host group

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of device IDs

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Comma separated list of hostnames

parameters.name: host_group_id
parameters.description: Static host group ID

actions.name: Remove Hosts
actions.description: Remove one or more hosts from the static host group

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of device IDs

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of hostnames

parameters.name: host_group_id
parameters.description: Static host group ID

actions.name: Create Session
actions.description: Initialize a new session with the Real Time Response cloud

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Device ID for session to be created

parameters.name: queue_offline
parameters.description: Queue commands for offline devices, will execute when system comes back online

actions.name: Delete Session
actions.description: Deletes a Real Time Response session

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: RTR Session ID

actions.name: List Detections
actions.description: Get a list of detections *The action uses legacy Detects API being deprecated. Please use the 'list epp alerts' action instead*

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum detections to be fetched

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression used to limit the fetched detections (FQL Syntax)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

actions.name: List Epp Alerts
actions.description: Get a list of epp alerts, replaces legacy Detects API

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum alerts to be fetched

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression used to limit the fetched alerts (FQL Syntax)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

actions.name: Get Detections Details
actions.description: Get a list of detections details by providing detection IDs *The action uses legacy Detects API being deprecated. Please use the 'get epp details' action instead*

parameters.name: detection_ids
parameters.description: List of detection IDs. Comma-separated list allowed

actions.name: Get Epp Details
actions.description: Get list of alert details for EPP alerts by providing composite IDs, replaces legacy Detects API

parameters.name: alert_ids
parameters.description: List of alert composite_ids. Comma-separated list allowed

actions.name: Update Detections
actions.description: Update detections in crowdstrike host *The action uses legacy Detects API being deprecated. Please use the 'update epp alerts' action instead*

parameters.name: detection_ids
parameters.description: List of Detection IDs to update, Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to add to the detection (Maximum 2048 bytes)

parameters.name: assigned_to_user
parameters.description: User ID to assign

parameters.name: show_in_ui
parameters.description: This detection is displayed or not in falcon UI

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status to set

actions.name: Update Epp Alerts
actions.description: Update EPP alerts in CrowdStrike, replaces legacy Detects API

parameters.name: alert_ids
parameters.description: List of alert composite_ids to update, Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to add to the alert (Maximum 2048 bytes)

parameters.name: assigned_to_user
parameters.description: User to assign (can be email, UUID, or username)

parameters.name: unassign
parameters.description: If there are any users currently assigned to specified alerts, unassign them

parameters.name: show_in_ui
parameters.description: Control whether this alert is displayed in Falcon UI

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status to set

parameters.name: add_tags
parameters.description: Tags to add to the alert, Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: remove_tags
parameters.description: Tags to remove from the alert, Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: remove_tags_by_prefix
parameters.description: Remove all tags with this prefix

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Get a list of alerts

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum alerts to be fetched

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression used to limit the fetched alerts (FQL Syntax)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: include_hidden
parameters.description: Include hidden alerts

actions.name: List Sessions
actions.description: Lists Real Time Response sessions

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum RTR sessions to be fetched

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression used to limit the fetched RTR sessions (FQL Syntax)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

actions.name: Run Command
actions.description: Execute an active responder command on a single host

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Device ID

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: RTR Session ID

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: RTR command to execute on host

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data/Arguments for the command

actions.name: Run Admin Command
actions.description: Execute an RTR Admin command on a single host

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Device ID

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: RTR Session ID

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: RTR Admin command to execute on host

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data/Arguments for the command

actions.name: Get Command Details
actions.description: Retrieve results of an active responder command executed on a single host

parameters.name: cloud_request_id
parameters.description: Cloud Request ID for Command

parameters.name: timeout_seconds
parameters.description: Time (in seconds; default is 60) to wait before timing out poll for results

actions.name: List Session Files
actions.description: Get a list of files for the specified RTR session

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: RTR Session ID

actions.name: Get Incident Behaviors
actions.description: Get details on behaviors by providing behavior IDs

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of behavior IDs. Comma separated list allowed

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Perform a set of actions on one or more incidents, such as adding tags or comments or updating the incident name or description

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of incident IDs. Comma separated list allowed

parameters.name: add_tag
parameters.description: Adds the associated tag to all the incident(s) of the ids list. See example values for the defined list

parameters.name: delete_tag
parameters.description: Deletes the matching tag from all the incident(s) in the ids list. See example values for the defined list

parameters.name: update_name
parameters.description: Updates the name of all the incident(s) in the ids list

parameters.name: update_description
parameters.description: Updates the description of all the incident(s) listed in the ids

parameters.name: update_status
parameters.description: Updates the status of all the incident(s) in the ids list

parameters.name: add_comment
parameters.description: Adds a comment for all the incident(s) in the ids list

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: Get information about all users in your Customer ID

actions.name: Get User Roles
actions.description: Gets the roles that are assigned to the user

parameters.name: user_uuid
parameters.description: Users Unqiue ID to get the roles for

actions.name: List Roles
actions.description: Get information about all user roles from your Customer ID

actions.name: Get Role
actions.description: Get information about all user roles from your Customer ID

parameters.name: role_id
parameters.description: Role ID to get information about. Comma separated list allowed

actions.name: List Crowdscores
actions.description: Query environment wide CrowdScore and return the entity data

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional filter and sort criteria in the form of an FQL query

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort the results by a specific field and direction. (Example: assigned_to.asc)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids. (Defaults to 0)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of results to return. (Defaults to 50, Max 500)

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Get details on incidents by providing incident IDs

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of incident IDs. Comma separated list allowed

actions.name: List Incident Behaviors
actions.description: Search for behaviors by providing an FQL filter, sorting, and paging details

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional filter and sort criteria in the form of an FQL query

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort the results by a specific field and direction. (Example: assigned_to.asc)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids. (Defaults to 0)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of results to return. (Defaults to 50, Max 500)

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Search for incidents by providing an FQL filter, sorting, and paging details

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional filter and sort criteria in the form of an FQL query

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort the results by a specific field and direction. (Example: assigned_to.asc)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids. (Defaults to 0)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of results to return. (Defaults to 50, Max 500)

actions.name: Get Session File
actions.description: Get RTR extracted file contents for the specified session and sha256 and add it to the vault

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: RTR Session ID

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash to retrieve

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Filename to use for the archive name and the file within the archive

actions.name: Set Status
actions.description: Set the state of a detection in Crowdstrike Host *The action uses legacy Detects API being deprecated. Please use the 'resolve epp alerts' action instead*

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Detection ID to set the state of

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State to set

actions.name: Resolve Epp Alerts
actions.description: Update the status of an EPP alert in CrowdStrike, replaces legacy Detects API

parameters.name: alert_ids
parameters.description: List of alert composite_ids to update, Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status to set

actions.name: Get System Info
actions.description: Get details of a device, given the device ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Device ID from previous Crowdstrike IOC search

actions.name: Get Process Detail
actions.description: Retrieve the details of a process that is running or that previously ran, given a process ID

parameters.name: falcon_process_id
parameters.description: Process ID from previous Falcon IOC search

actions.name: Hunt File
actions.description: Hunt for a file on the network by querying for the hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: File hash to search

parameters.name: count_only
parameters.description: Get endpoint count only

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum device IDs to be fetched (defaults to 100)

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: A single, specific tenant id to search. By default, will search asset main tenant and all listed subtenants; to search only main tenant (even if you have subtenants) use 'main'

actions.name: Hunt Domain
actions.description: Get a list of device IDs on which the domain was matched

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain to search

parameters.name: count_only
parameters.description: Get endpoint count only

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum device IDs to be fetched (defaults to 100)

actions.name: Hunt Ip
actions.description: Get a list of device IDs on which the ip was matched

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address to search

parameters.name: count_only
parameters.description: Get endpoint count only

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum device IDs to be fetched (defaults to 100)

actions.name: File Reputation
actions.description: Queries CrowdStrike for the file info given a vault ID or a SHA256 hash, vault ID has higher priority than SHA256 hash if both are provided

parameters.description: Vault ID of file

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum reports to be fetched

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids (defaults to 0)

parameters.name: detail_report
parameters.description: Get the detailed report

actions.name: Url Reputation
actions.description: Queries CrowdStrike for the url info

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to query

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum reports to be fetched

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids (defaults to 0)

parameters.name: detail_report
parameters.description: Get the detailed report

actions.description: To download the report of the provided artifact id

actions.name: Detonate File
actions.description: Upload a file to CrowdStrike and retrieve the analysis results

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of file

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: Sandbox environment to be used for analysis

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: A descriptive comment to identify the file

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum reports to be fetched

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set from which to return ids (Defaults to 0)

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: Command line script passed to the submitted file at runtime (Max length: 2048 characters)

parameters.name: document_password
parameters.description: Password of the document if password protected (Max length: 32 characters)

parameters.name: submit_name
parameters.description: Name of the malware sample that's used for file type detection and analysis

parameters.name: user_tags
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of user tags (Max length: 100 characters per tag)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: action_script
parameters.description: Runtime script for sandbox analysis

parameters.name: detail_report
parameters.description: Get the detailed report

parameters.name: enable_tor
parameters.description: To route the sandbox network traffic via TOR

parameters.name: is_confidential
parameters.description: Defines visibility of the file in Falcon MalQuery (defaults to True)

parameters.name: document_password
parameters.description: Password of the document if password protected (Max length: 32 characters)

parameters.name: command_line

parameters.name: user_tags
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of user tags (Max length: 100 characters per tag)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Property to sort by

parameters.name: action_script
parameters.description: Runtime script for sandbox analysis

parameters.name: detail_report
parameters.description: Get the detailed report

parameters.name: enable_tor
parameters.description: To route the sandbox network traffic via TOR

actions.name: Get Device Scroll
actions.description: Search for hosts in your environment by platform, hostname, IP, and other criteria with continuous pagination capability (based on offset pointer which expires after 2 minutes with no maximum limit)

parameters.description: The offset to page from, for the next result set

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum records to return. [1-5000]

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The property to sort by (e.g. status.desc or hostname.asc)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: The offset to page from, for the next result set

actions.name: Create Ioa Rule

parameters.description: Rule Group ID in which to create this rule

parameters.description: Rule name

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Rule description

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Rule severity (run the "list ioa severities" action to find valid severities)

parameters.description: Rule type to create (run the "list ioa types" action to find valid types of rules and their IDs and parameters)

parameters.name: disposition_id
parameters.description: The action that the rule should take when triggered (valid dispositions can be found in the "list ioa types" output)

parameters.name: field_values
parameters.description: JSON list of parameters to pass to the new rule (valid fields can be found in the "list ioa types" output)

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment for the audit log (optional)

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Enable this rule immediately
